---
title: "Draft R Markdown document"
author: "Your Name"
format: html
editor:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
    canonical: true
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
source(here::here("R/functions.R"))
lipidomics <- read_csv(here::here("data/lipidomics.csv"))
```

## Basic statistics

```{r basic-stats}
lipidomics %>% 
    group_by(metabolite) %>%
    summarise(across(value, list(mean = mean, sd = sd))) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(.x, digits = 1)))
```

```{r}
# Code chunk
```

## This is poorly formatted

-   This is item 1
-   This is item 2
